raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "prescribes a disciplined spiritual practice for aligning personal consciousness with perceived divine will",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God or higher power exists whose will is knowable",
    "prayer and meditation can establish and improve conscious contact with that power",
    "the sole appropriate requests are for knowledge of divine will and capacity to enact it",
    "human understanding of God is sufficient to guide this contact"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within a theistic framework that posits a responsive, willful deity and treats prayer/meditation as reliable epistemic and volitional channels",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a responsive higher power exists, or the practice reliably produces psychological integration, reduced self-will, and prosocial behavior regardless of metaphysical truth",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such higher power exists and the practice fosters dependency on imagined guidance, externalizes responsibility, or discourages autonomous ethical reasoning"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: prescribes a disciplined spiritual practice for aligning personal consciousness with perceived divine will
implicit_claims: a God or higher power exists whose will is knowable
prayer and meditation can establish and improve conscious contact with that power
the sole appropriate requests are for knowledge of divine will and capacity to enact it
human understanding of God is sufficient to guide this contact

parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: a responsive higher power exists, or the practice reliably produces psychological integration, reduced self-will, and prosocial behavior regardless of metaphysical truth
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: no such higher power exists and the practice fosters dependency on imagined guidance, externalizes responsibility, or discourages autonomous ethical reasoning
